headline: Episode 4
summary: Headlines include Federal Reserve, Boris Johnson, Tesla and Elizabeth Holmes
body_text:
This edition features these stories from ft.com

Joe Biden nominates Jay Powell for second term as Fed chair

Senior Tories demand shake-up of Boris Johnson’s top team

Tesla short sellers back down after meteoric rise

Elizabeth Holmes describes Theranos’s ‘big idea’ to jurors
